outline.title: Word Family: -ike
outline.summary: One word family -ike with 3 words: bike, hike, like. Each word has a large clear illustration next to it.

outline.title: Story Time: Dear Zoo
outline.summary: Story cover introduction with a large mysterious crate/package from the zoo with zoo stamp and address label.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: He was too BIG!
outline.summary: Story scene: A huge crate opens to reveal an elephant. Text: He was too big! I sent him back.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: She was too TALL!
outline.summary: Story scene: A tall crate opens to reveal a giraffe. Text: She was too tall! I sent her back.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: He was too FIERCE!
outline.summary: Story scene: A crate opens to reveal a fierce lion with a big mane roaring. Text: He was too fierce! I sent him back.

outline.title: He was too GRUMPY!
outline.summary: Story scene: A crate opens to reveal a grumpy camel with an annoyed expression. Text: He was too grumpy! I sent him back.

outline.title: He was too SCARY!
outline.summary: Story scene: A crate opens to reveal a long snake slithering out. Text: He was too scary! I sent him back.

outline.title: He was too NAUGHTY!
outline.summary: Story scene: A crate opens to reveal a mischievous monkey causing chaos. Text: He was too naughty! I sent him back.

outline.title: He was too JUMPY!
outline.summary: Story scene: A crate opens to reveal a frog jumping everywhere. Text: He was too jumpy! I sent him back.

outline.title: He was PERFECT!
outline.summary: Story scene: A small basket opens to reveal a puppy. Text: He was perfect! I kept him.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
